# ai-access-cli — Package Context

`@tokamak-network/ai-access-cli` v1.0.12 — CLI to configure AI tools with TON AI Access LiteLLM keys.

## Commands

```bash
npm run build        # tsup bundle → dist/index.js
npm run dev          # tsup --watch (live rebuild)
npm test             # vitest run (unit tests)
npm run test:watch   # vitest watch mode
```

## Publishing

`git push` triggers CI which publishes to npm automatically. CI skips publish if the version in `package.json` already exists on the registry.

**IMPORTANT — before every `git push` that contains source changes in `cli/`:**
Always bump the version first. If you skip this, CI will silently skip the publish step.

```bash
npm version patch    # bug fix:    1.0.3 → 1.0.4
npm version minor    # new feature: 1.0.3 → 1.1.0
npm version major    # breaking:    1.0.3 → 2.0.0
```

`npm version` updates `package.json` and `package-lock.json`. Also update the version string in `CLAUDE.md` (line with `@tokamak-network/ai-access-cli vX.Y.Z`). Then commit:

```bash
git add package.json package-lock.json CLAUDE.md
git commit -m "chore(cli): bump version to X.Y.Z"
git push
```

Use `patch` by default unless the change adds a new feature (minor) or breaks compatibility (major).

Live E2E tests (Docker required):
```bash
cd scripts/live-test
./run.sh             # builds image + runs run-live-tests.sh inside container
# Do NOT run run-live-tests.sh directly on the host
```

## Architecture

- `src/commands/` — configure.ts, revert.ts, env-cleanup.ts
- `src/targets/` — claude.ts, codex.ts, hermes.ts, openclaw.ts (one per AI tool)
- `src/lib/` — backup.ts, shell-profile.ts, markers.ts, litellm.ts, prompts.ts, logger.ts
- `tests/targets/` — per-target unit tests (claude, codex, hermes, openclaw)
- `tests/lib/` — lib unit tests (backup, json-merge, markers, shell-profile)
- `scripts/live-test/` — Docker-based E2E test suite

## Targets

| Target | Config location |
|--------|----------------|
| claude | `~/.claude/settings.json` + shell env |
| codex  | `~/.codex/config.toml` + shell env |
| hermes | `~/.hermes/config.yaml` |
| openclaw | `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` |

## Gotchas

- `revert` restores env vars in shell profile but takes effect only after `source ~/.zshrc` or shell restart
- Version string injected at build time via `tsup define` from package.json — `__PKG_VERSION__` in source
- `configure-cli.sh` in `scripts/` and `public/` are deprecated; prefer `npx @tokamak-network/ai-access-cli`
- Unit tests mock file I/O — E2E correctness validated by Docker live tests in `scripts/live-test/`
